title: Elbaf’s Children Become Targets
description: On pages 17–17, this part focuses on Unknown person #16 as The Elbaf conflict sharpens around Loki, the God’s Knights, giant children, and the secrets of the island’s royal past.
scene: The Elbaf conflict sharpens around Loki, the God’s Knights, giant children, and the secrets of the island’s royal past.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: If we were to spare him...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Would you change your mind then?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: So... that's how you operate. Huh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Well if that was your offer...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: and wish him peace in death.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: It's okay to grieve and rage...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But a warrior never kicks and screams in the face of death!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and use it to fuel me when I reduce this world to rubble!!

summary: This part advances the Loki and the Holy Knights through 12 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
